arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: Study Unit Seven Cost Management Concepts 7.1 Cost Management Terminology .......................................................................................
keywords: Study Unit Seven Cost Management Concepts

english: 11 This study unit is the first of five on cost management.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: 11 This study unit is the first of five on cost management.

english: The relative weight assigned to this major topic in Part 1 of the exam is 15%.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: The relative weight assigned to this major topic in Part 1 of the exam is 15%.

english: Thus, the CMA exam greatly emphasizes this area of study.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: Thus, the CMA exam greatly emphasizes this area of study.

english: The candidate will face many questions involving numerical calculations and others requiring a knowledge of cost terminology and the implications of cost management decisions.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: The candidate will face many questions involving numerical calculations and others requiring a knowledge of cost terminology and the implications of cost management decisions.

english: There is a strategic value in knowing cost information.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: There is a strategic value in knowing cost information.

english: For example, costs need to be known for pricing and overhead allocation purposes.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: For example, costs need to be known for pricing and overhead allocation purposes.

english: 7.1 Cost Management Terminology Subdisciplines of Accounting Financial accounting is concerned principally with reporting to external users, usually through a set of financial statements produced in accordance with GAAP.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: 7.1 Cost Management Terminology Subdisciplines of Accounting Financial accounting is concerned principally with reporting to external users, usually through a set of financial statements produced in accordance with GAAP.

english: Financial accounting has a historical focus.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: Financial accounting has a historical focus.

english: Management accounting is concerned principally with reporting to internal users.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: Management accounting is concerned principally with reporting to internal users.

english: The management accountant’s goal is to produce reports that improve organizational decision making.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: The management accountant’s goal is to produce reports that improve organizational decision making.

english: Management accounting is future-oriented.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: Management accounting is future-oriented.

english: Cost accounting supports both financial and management accounting.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: Cost accounting supports both financial and management accounting.

english: Information about the cost of resources acquired and consumed by an organization underlies effective reporting for both external and internal users.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: Information about the cost of resources acquired and consumed by an organization underlies effective reporting for both external and internal users.

english: ● In financial accounting, costing information is used to account for cost of goods sold and inventory in external financial reports.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: ● In financial accounting, costing information is used to account for cost of goods sold and inventory in external financial reports.

english: ● In managerial accounting, costing information is used to make decisions about costs, production, budgeting, and pricing.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: ● In managerial accounting, costing information is used to make decisions about costs, production, budgeting, and pricing.

english: Basic Cost Definitions A cost is defined by the IMA in two senses: ● “In financial accounting, the sacrifice measured by the price paid or required to be paid to acquire goods or services.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: Basic Cost Definitions A cost is defined by the IMA in two senses: ● “In financial accounting, the sacrifice measured by the price paid or required to be paid to acquire goods or services.

english: The term ‘cost’ is often used when referring to the valuation of a good or service acquired.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: The term ‘cost’ is often used when referring to the valuation of a good or service acquired.

english: When ‘cost’ is used in this sense, a cost is an asset.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: When ‘cost’ is used in this sense, a cost is an asset.

english: When the benefits of the acquisition (the goods or services) expire, the cost becomes an expense or loss.” ● “In management accounting, a measurement in monetary terms of the amount of resources used for some purpose.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: When the benefits of the acquisition (the goods or services) expire, the cost becomes an expense or loss.” ● “In management accounting, a measurement in monetary terms of the amount of resources used for some purpose.

english: The term by itself is not operational.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: The term by itself is not operational.

english: It becomes operational when modified by a term that defines the purpose, such as acquisition cost, incremental cost, or fixed cost.” A cost object is any object to which costs can be attached.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: It becomes operational when modified by a term that defines the purpose, such as acquisition cost, incremental cost, or fixed cost.” A cost object is any object to which costs can be attached.

english: Examples are products, processes, employees, departments, and facilities.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: Examples are products, processes, employees, departments, and facilities.

english: A cost driver is the basis used to assign costs to a cost object.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: A cost driver is the basis used to assign costs to a cost object.

english: In other words, a cost driver is some event that causes costs to occur.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: In other words, a cost driver is some event that causes costs to occur.

english: Indirect Costs can be classified by how they are assigned to cost objects.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: Indirect Costs can be classified by how they are assigned to cost objects.

english: Direct costs are costs that can be associated with a particular cost object in an economically feasible way, i.e., they can be traced to that object.
arabic: [ترجمة سياقية]: Direct costs are costs that can be associated with a particular cost object in an economically feasible way, i.e., they can be traced to that object.
